clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content:
What I'm diong to prevent this, is I am adding a question into the form people fill out. 

I am going to ask: are you looking to get hired for a job, or to get electrical work done on your home?

If they choose job, we will disqualify them, and not let them fill out the form.

This should help weed out people who are reaching out for that reason

clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content:
Yes, regarding the 4 month agreement, the 120 days of active ad delivery were completed today. Although the contract technically ended a few days ago, I did not count the initial setup period toward that timeline. I only counted the days the campaigns were actually live and generating leads. And at this point we've completed that (today).

At this point, we now have a meaningful amount of data to work from, which puts us in a much better position to evaluate performance and identify what needs to be refined. For example, the updated form to filter out people looking for employment is one clear improvement, but I’m sure there are other insights from your side that could help us sharpen the process further. That could include changes to the ad messaging, adjustments to the follow-up sequence, or refining how we position the offer so we attract more of the right type of customer.

To make smart decisions on next steps, we need a clearer picture of what happened after the leads came in. Specifically, which leads turned into real opportunities, which jobs were closed, where drop-off happened, and what points of failure may have affected overall conversion. That will allow us to separate lead generation performance from sales process issues and identify the highest-leverage optimizations moving forward.

I’d love to get on a call with you this week to do a full retro on the campaign, review the results together, and get clarity on the overall outcome. From our side, leads were being generated consistently and follow-up was happening throughout the campaign. What I do not have full visibility on yet is what ultimately happened with those leads beyond hearing that a couple of jobs closed and that some unqualified inquiries about people looking for employment came through.

Do you have time this week to review everything together?
